focus: Leverage the local Ollama instance behind local_llm for real local Cranfield embeddings and test whether vector/hybrid retrieval improves NDCG.
reason_started: The operator asked to leverage /Users/feroshjacob/codefj/local_llm for embeddings.
reason_ended: Ollama embeddings completed and were evaluated, but the best hybrid result remained below refined PRF.

validators_executed.name: npm run embed:cranfield -- --provider ollama --model llama3.1:8b
validators_executed.evidence: Generated real local Ollama embeddings for 1,400 Cranfield documents and 225 queries.

validators_executed.name: npm run eval:cranfield:vector with Ollama embeddings
validators_executed.evidence: Vector-only and hybrid evaluations completed; best Ollama nDCG@10 was 0.3035, below refined PRF 0.3260.

validators_executed.name: npm run validate
validators_executed.evidence: 35 node tests passed; MDE parser, traceability validation through GEN-019, fixture index check, and fixture evaluation passed. Final run is recorded in VAL-029.

validators_skipped.name: remote OpenSearch vector index validation
validators_skipped.reason: Deferred because the offline Ollama hybrid result did not beat refined PRF.

validators_skipped.name: Cloudflare deploy verification
validators_skipped.reason: No deployment was requested; GEN-019 leaves the public/default architecture unchanged.

evidence_quality_notes: This is a real local embedding run through Ollama, not a deterministic control.
The available llama3.1:8b chat-model embeddings were weak for vector-only retrieval and did not improve enough in hybrid mode.
A dedicated embedding model or neural reranker is required before considering ARCH-0.3-candidate promotion.
